title: Blue Star India Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Blue Star India Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Blue Star India Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ranchi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Blue Star India Global Group:
Blue Star India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India Global Group!
